title: Publish Taskulus to PyPI
description: Prepare and publish a PyPI release for Taskulus. Requires versioning, build artifacts, and credentials.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Investigating failed PyPI release publishing workflow. Will check GitHub Actions logs, adjust workflow or semantic-release configuration, and re-run once fixed.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Release workflow failed because semantic-release could not find a token. Updated release workflow to export GH_TOKEN from secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN (semantic-release expects GH_TOKEN). Need rerun Release workflow after commit/push.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Pushed fix to export GH_TOKEN for semantic-release. CI is running; Release workflow should trigger on CI success to publish to PyPI.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Fixed Python coverage regression (daemon lifecycle scenarios and CLI stderr capture) so CI can pass and Release workflow can trigger.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Release workflow failing due to missing tags. Added semantic-release version step and configured allow_zero_version=true, major_on_zero=false so initial release can tag 0.x. Publish now runs after version step.

custom.beads_close_reason: Already published to PyPI long ago (confirmed).
custom.beads_notes:
Pending PyPI credentials and release process confirmation (version, tag, build). Provide PyPI token or trusted publisher setup to proceed.
Reminder: PyPI publish still pending; needs packaging, versioning, and credentials/trusted publisher setup.
Starting PyPI publish workflow; need token and version confirmation before uploading.
Added semantic-release config in python/pyproject.toml and release workflow .github/workflows/release.yml to publish on CI success. Requires GitHub secret PYPI_TOKEN; release job runs semantic-release publish from python/ directory.
